{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180502F3AC0AB44F92366FCB03"}"},"total":5811},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7249729116121989892","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级喜欢这本书，男主是真的宠老婆，系统对女主也很好在很努力的保证女主的安全，我超级喜欢娱乐圈那个位面，两个戏精，很好笑但也很甜。期待作者大大的更新哦","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":43,"text":"娱乐圈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774260302366FCB03%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227249729116121989892%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227223961713240968232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687959175,"group_id":"7223961713240968232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只爱看符合我爱好的文，杂食党，和我心意我都看，喜欢囤文养文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9VsndhegJdyZcnEcMVr8GT95Mmrri9ShZZ22sdm32cO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5643cb3d1d1a47e29d75f245bb4619a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789926&x-signature=zr6pKgDRYHtD9q0sSbwnxG9mq9k%3D","user_id":"1019946843247501","user_name":"啥题材都能啃两口"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1019946843247501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7223961713240968232","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠1v1】
云卿为了无上美味，答应绑定系统，扮演恶毒女配。
她认认真真走剧情，结果……
霸总他不愿意追妻火葬场了，只想死磕念念不忘的白月光。
影帝他不和小新人秀恩爱了，只想和影后早日官宣撒狗粮。
仙尊他不偏宠傻白甜徒弟了，只想和苏醒的道侣恩爱久长。
……
云卿：？？？
“系统！男主他为什么崩剧情？”
系统弱弱道：“可能男主比较叛逆？”
当然是因为，他是你那被人掳走的老公啊！
